  • Riad Rosemary

Morocco • Boutique riad

Riad Rosemary

A design-led riad choice for travelers who want the medina experience without giving up comfort and calm.

★ 4.6 219 reviews
Image slot Stay Riad Rosemary

About this stay

Riad Rosemary fits Marrakech because the strongest stays are often courtyard riads that offer a quiet retreat after dense souk and food touring.

Why it works for this route

Medina access can involve walking from vehicle drop-off points. Pack light if staying inside the old city.

Amenities

  • Medina setting
  • Riad courtyard
  • Rooftop terrace
  • Hammam-style calm

Best nearby attraction

Marrakech & Atlas Gateway is the clearest anchor for this stay.

Booking path

From $240 / night

Marrakech medina
